sizing_rule.note: Fixed-ratio position sizing (one-unit-per-$12,500) applies only when account >= $250K minimum threshold. Enables scaling of exposure during profitable cycles with 5% equity growth requirement. This is a gating condition for Anti-Martingale scaling logic.

source_rule_text: A trader should set a minimum account size threshold before implementing fixed-ratio position sizing, because accounts below that threshold cannot efficiently scale exposure during winning streaks.
